description: 60 questions about birthday invitations, RSVPs, guest etiquette, party planning communication, and social invitation culture (30 regular Jeopardy-style + 30 Cards Against Humanity style)

jeopardy_questions.clue: This formal written request asks someone to attend a party or event.
The abbreviation used on invitations that asks guests to confirm they're coming.
This date is printed on an invitation to tell guests when the party happens.
This information on an invitation tells guests where to go for the party.
This person receives an invitation to attend a birthday party.
You should respond to a birthday invitation at least this many days in advance.
This is the polite response when you plan to attend a birthday party.
This is the appropriate response if you cannot attend a birthday party.
jeopardy_questions.answer: What is 'no' or 'I regret to inform you I cannot attend'?

jeopardy_questions.clue: The maximum number of guests typically invited to a party depends on this factor.
jeopardy_questions.answer: What is the venue size or budget?

jeopardy_questions.clue: This is a list of all the people invited to a birthday party.
Digital invitations sent via email are often called this.
jeopardy_questions.answer: What is an e-invitation or e-vite?

jeopardy_questions.clue: This popular website is commonly used to send digital party invitations.
This social media platform is increasingly used to send birthday party invitations.
The host should follow up with non-respondents at least this long before the party.
This detail on an invitation tells guests what time the party begins.
This information helps guests know how long to stay at a birthday party.
It's important to include this person's contact information on the invitation for questions.
jeopardy_questions.answer: What is the host's phone number or email?

jeopardy_questions.clue: This term describes people you're not sure whether to invite to your party.
Inviting someone's friend without their consent is called this.
These three letters on an invitation stand for Regrets Only.
A guest should mention this dietary need on their RSVP response.
jeopardy_questions.answer: What is allergies or dietary restrictions?

jeopardy_questions.clue: The deadline date for responding to an invitation is usually called the RSVP this.
If you're not sure about attending, you might tell the host you need this many days to decide.
A handwritten invitation is considered this level of formality.
This type of invitation is printed and mailed through the postal service.
jeopardy_questions.answer: What is a formal invitation or card?

jeopardy_questions.clue: A text message invitation is generally considered this level of formality.
This is the appropriate time frame for sending invitations before a party.
If a guest accidentally doesn't respond, the host should send them this.
A celebrity or important person who sends regrets should still include this in their response.
jeopardy_questions.answer: What is a kind note or apology?

jeopardy_questions.clue: The most common reason someone declines a birthday party invitation is this.

cah_questions.clue: That one person who responds 'maybe' to the birthday invitation, ruins the headcount, then doesn't show up
cah_questions.answer: What is friendship ending?
cah_questions.why_it_works: Universal party planning pain point, relatable frustration

cah_questions.clue: The emergency excuse you Google at 2pm when you totally forgot you RSVPd 'yes' to something
cah_questions.answer: What is a fake family emergency?
cah_questions.why_it_works: Everyone has done this + relatable social anxiety

cah_questions.clue: How your mom responds to 'Can I bring 5 random people to my party?' without saying the word 'no'
cah_questions.answer: What is a disappointed sigh?
cah_questions.why_it_works: Classic parent reaction, universally understood communication

cah_questions.clue: What you do with the guest list your mom made vs. what you actually wanted to invite
cah_questions.answer: What is completely ignore it?

cah_questions.clue: The thing that makes RSVPing to a Millennial's party harder than actually attending
cah_questions.answer: What is Eventbrite with a novelty payment process?
cah_questions.why_it_works: Modern party planning culture, mainstream complaint

cah_questions.clue: Your drunk uncle's take when he asks why he wasn't on the guest list 'for a family friend'
cah_questions.answer: What is 'well I guess I'm dead to everyone' while cracking a beer?

cah_questions.clue: What grandma does when you don't invite her but your cousin posts about the party on social media
cah_questions.answer: What is call and guilt trip you?

cah_questions.clue: The real reason your coworker 'can't make it' to your birthday party
cah_questions.answer: What is they don't actually like you?

cah_questions.clue: What happens 2 minutes after you send the group chat invitation to your 'close friends'
cah_questions.answer: What is half of them are already in other plans?

cah_questions.clue: The app your Facebook friends use to RSVP 'interested' then ghost you completely
cah_questions.answer: What is Facebook events?

cah_questions.clue: That couple who asks 'can we bring our kids?' when the invitation literally said 'adults only'
cah_questions.answer: What is intentional obliviousness?

cah_questions.clue: How many people from your 47-person group chat actually read the invitation details before asking 'where is this again?'
cah_questions.answer: What is none?

cah_questions.clue: What your mom calls it when she insists on inviting people you literally have no memory of
cah_questions.answer: What is 'family friends you should know'?

cah_questions.clue: The state of your anxiety when someone responds 'can I bring a date?' 12 hours before the party
cah_questions.answer: What is full panic?

cah_questions.clue: What you put in the RSVP details when you really need people to actually tell you if they're coming
cah_questions.answer: What is 'I need a headcount' or threatening emojis?

cah_questions.clue: That person who RSVPs 'yes' to absolutely everything on their timeline without reading the date
cah_questions.answer: What is someone who will definitely flake?

cah_questions.clue: How to diplomatically tell your crush they're not invited without crushing their soul
cah_questions.answer: What is: you can't, so pretend the group just came up with the list?

cah_questions.clue: Why your ex is still on the group chat and responding to party invitations like nothing happened
cah_questions.answer: What is mutual friends who don't understand social boundaries?

cah_questions.clue: The amount of time your anxious self spends planning the guest list before actually inviting anyone
cah_questions.answer: What is way too long?

cah_questions.clue: What you do when the person who RSVPd for 5 people shows up alone
cah_questions.answer: What is pretend you never asked 'where's everyone else?'?

cah_questions.clue: The real purpose of the RSVP deadline when people respond for the next 2 weeks anyway
cah_questions.answer: What is a gentle fiction?

cah_questions.clue: Why your best friend suddenly acts like they're a celebrity when you send them the guest list
cah_questions.answer: What is FOMO or jealousy about who else is invited?

cah_questions.clue: The emoji your drunk group chat sends when someone gets invited to a party they weren't part of planning
cah_questions.answer: What is the crying face or middle finger?

cah_questions.clue: What passive-aggressive thing you check after not being invited to someone's party
cah_questions.answer: What is their Instagram stories from the party?

cah_questions.clue: How your cousin responds when you invite them to a party instead of their spouse you're closer to
cah_questions.answer: What is 'well I'm definitely not coming'?

cah_questions.clue: The text you send when someone RSVPs 'yes' but you literally do not remember who they are
cah_questions.answer: What is 'awesome, see you there!' with internal confusion?
cah_questions.why_it_works: Social media connections you've forgotten about

cah_questions.clue: Why your introverted friend says 'yes' to the party invitation then cancels hours before
cah_questions.answer: What is social battery depletion?
cah_questions.why_it_works: Modern mental health understanding, relatable behavior

cah_questions.clue: The universal lie you tell when declining a birthday invitation you just can't face
cah_questions.answer: What is 'I have to work' or 'family thing'?

cah_questions.clue: What the plus-one person does the entire party when they don't know anyone there
cah_questions.answer: What is stand awkwardly by the snacks?

cah_questions.clue: The email subject line that guarantees nobody will actually read your party invitation details
cah_questions.answer: What is anything longer than 6 words?
